allow: PowerShell($cfg = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\configstore\\firebase-tools.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($cfg.tokens.refresh_token\) { "refresh token found" } else { "no token" })

PowerShell($cfg = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\meste\\.config\\configstore\\firebase-tools.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $body = @{ grant_type = "refresh_token"; refresh_token = $cfg.tokens.refresh_token; client_id = "563584335869-fgrhgmd47bqnekij5i8b5pr03ho849e6.apps.googleusercontent.com"; client_secret = "j9iVZfS8kkCEFUPaAeJV0sAi" }; $tok = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token" -Body $body; $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($tok.access_token\)" }; foreach \($uid in @\('jEaD8eQvjVT9Se9n7E157lJity63','R052gCBhGJRcUlesVZZ93u03Wt03'\)\) { $d = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/mi-rincon-de-lectura/databases/\(default\)/documents/users/$uid" -Headers $h; $tokens = $d.fields.fcmTokens.arrayValue.values; "UID: $uid"; "  username: $\($d.fields.username.stringValue\)"; "  num fcmTokens: $\($tokens.Count\)"; if \($tokens\) { $tokens | ForEach-Object { "    token: $\($_.stringValue.Substring\(0,25\)\)..." } } })
